trial_details.trajectory:
<output>
Diagnosis:
The pod `port-mismatch-deployment-b5cf5b8bc-rnjnt` in namespace `case5-test` had a mismatch between the container port (5000) and the expected port (8080) defined in the deployment spec. This caused the pod to not be ready and unable to serve traffic.

Fix:
1. Used `kubectl patch deployment` to update the container port in the deployment spec from 5000 to 8080.
2. Deleted the problematic pod `port-mismatch-deployment-b5cf5b8bc-rnjnt` so that a new pod with the corrected port would be created.

FIX COMPLETE
</output>
